_comment: Reference only — bootstrap.py wires this for you (and picks the right scope). Paste into ~/.claude/settings.json (global) or .claude/settings.json (project) if wiring by hand; MERGE into existing hooks.SessionStart / hooks.UserPromptSubmit rather than replacing them. For a global install, replace ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude with the absolute path to the skill dir. UserPromptSubmit takes no matcher (it fires on every prompt). The hook's stdout is added to Claude's context.
